releaseAlerts.label: GPT-5.5
releaseAlerts.message: openai released GPT-5.5 on 2026-04-23, and RT has not curated gpt-5.5 yet.

releaseAlerts.label: GPT-5.5 Pro
releaseAlerts.message: openai released GPT-5.5 Pro on 2026-04-23, and RT has not curated gpt-5.5-pro yet.

recommendedFollowUps: Review scripts/models/latest-models.json and scripts/models/model-drift-report.json for provider catalog drift.
If a new provider model should ship in RT, update scripts/models/registry.json and src/ai/registry/builtinModels.ts.
If RT surfaces cost or positioning for the model, update src/ai/cost/providerPricing.ts and src/data/aiModels.ts.
